name: Almond Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whole wheat pastry flour (sifted before measuring)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Lightly grease a baking sheet or use a nonstick one.
3. Mix together almond butter and oil; beat until smooth.
4. Add maple syrup and vanilla extract, mixing until well combined.
5. Stir together flour and salt. Add to the almond butter mixture and mix until just combined.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
7. Roll dough into 3/4-inch balls. Place on the baking sheet.
8. Flatten each ball with a fork.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the bottoms are lightly browned.
10. Cool for a couple of minutes on the baking sheet, then transfer to a cooling rack.
11. Enjoy.
Variation: Try using other nut butters.
